from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples into a fluent, single sentence.
    Uses a small predicate‑to‑phrase mapping to produce natural language
    (e.g. “birthPlace” → “was born in”).  All triples are combined into one
    complex sentence with proper punctuation.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Mapping from predicate to a natural‑language phrase.
    # The placeholder `{obj}` will be replaced by the object string.
    phrase_map = {
        "birthPlace": "was born in {obj}",
        "deathPlace": "died in {obj}",
        "birthDate": "was born on {obj}",
        "deathDate": "died on {obj}",
        "birthYear": "was born in {obj}",
        "deathYear": "died in {obj}",
        "nationality": "was a citizen of {obj}",
        "party": "was a member of the {obj}",
        "office": "held the office of {obj}",
        "spouse": "was married to {obj}",
        "successor": "was succeeded by {obj}",
        "predecessor": "succeeded {obj}",
        "region": "was associated with the region of {obj}",
        "residence": "resided at {obj}",
        "country": "was from {obj}",
        "currency": "used the {obj} as currency",
        "capital": "had its capital at {obj}",
        "largestCity": "had its largest city as {obj}",
        "language": "spoke {obj}",
        "officialLanguage": "had {obj} as an official language",
        "leader": "was led by {obj}",
        "governingBody": "was governed by {obj}",
        "affiliation": "was affiliated with {obj}",
        "trainerAircraft": "used {obj} as a trainer aircraft",
        "ethnicGroup": "included the ethnic group {obj}",
        "garrison": "had its garrison at {obj}",
        "place": "took place at {obj}",
        "militaryBranch": "served in the {obj}",
        "militaryRank": "held the rank of {obj}",
        "serviceStartYear": "started service in {obj}",
        "activeYearsStartDate": "started active years on {obj}",
        "activeYearsEndDate": "ended active years on {obj}",
        "numberOfVotesAttained": "received {obj} votes",
        "award": "was awarded the {obj}",
        "battle": "participated in the battle of {obj}",
        "commander": "was commanded by {obj}",
        "isPartOfMilitaryConflict": "was part of the {obj}",
        "inOfficeWhilePresident": "served while {obj} was president",
        "inOfficeWhilePrimeMinister": "served while {obj} was prime minister",
        "inOfficeWhileVicePresident": "served while {obj} was vice president",
        "inOfficeWhileGovernor": "served while {obj} was governor",
        "inOfficeWhileMonarch": "served while {obj} was monarch",
        "inOfficeWhileMinister": "served while {obj} was minister",
        "hasDeputy": "had {obj} as deputy",
        # default fallback uses the raw predicate
        "default": "{pred} {obj}",
    }

    # Build clauses, merging consecutive triples with the same subject to avoid repetition.
    clauses = []
    prev_subject = None
    for triple in triples:
        tmpl = phrase_map.get(triple.predicate, phrase_map["default"])
        # If the default template is used, keep the predicate word.
        if "{pred}" in tmpl:
            tmpl = tmpl.replace("{pred}", triple.predicate)
        # Strip surrounding quotes from the object if present.
        obj = triple.object.strip('\"')
        phrase = tmpl.format(obj=obj)
        if triple.subject == prev_subject:
            # Use a relative clause without repeating the subject.
            clause = f"{phrase}"
        else:
            clause = f"{triple.subject} {phrase}"
        clauses.append(clause)
        prev_subject = triple.subject

    # Combine clauses into a single sentence.
    if len(clauses) == 1:
        sentence = clauses[0] + "."
    else:
        sentence = ", ".join(clauses[:-1]) + ", and " + clauses[-1] + "."

    # Capitalize the first character.
    return sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
